name: Flight 3
location_str: Space One Launch Pad @ Spaceport Kii, JPN
description: Third flight of the KAIROS launch vehicle.   5 satellites will be on board:  * TATARA-1R * SC-Sat1a * HErO * AETS-1 * Nutsat-3 (TASA/Taiwan)
rocket_fact: To reach low Earth orbit, any rocket must travel at approximately 17,500 mph (28,000 km/h) sideways.
